title: Claude Code
description: Run Claude Code as an Agent OS agent with full tool access, file editing, and shell execution.

title: Filesystem
description: Mount and manage virtual filesystems with support for S3, local, and overlay drivers.

title: Web Browser
description: Headless Chromium browser for web scraping, testing, and automation tasks.

title: Code Interpreter
description: Execute Python and JavaScript code in a sandboxed environment with package support.

title: Terminal
description: Persistent shell sessions with PTY support for interactive command execution.
